content.inputFormat: Single line: JSON array of all arguments, e.g. [arg1, arg2, ...]

boilerPlates.Python3:
import sys, json
from typing import List

#  HELPER CLASSES  (do not modify)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
#  YOUR SOLUTION  <- Write your code inside the method below
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
class Solution:
    def candyCrush(self, board: List[List[int]]) -> List[List[int]]:
        pass

#  DRIVER  (do not modify)
if __name__ == '__main__':
    _args = json.loads(sys.stdin.readline())
    _board = _args[0]
    _result = Solution().candyCrush(_board)

    print(json.dumps(_result))

solution.approach: The approach uses a while loop to continuously crush candies in the same row or column and then drop the remaining candies down, repeating this process until no more candies can be crushed.
